details: The agent navigated to Wikipedia's Main Page, used the search box to search for 'Turing Award', clicked through to the Turing Award article, and correctly identified Alan Perlis as the first recipient in 1966. The answer matches the known fact. Although the agent had some navigation difficulties (fill went to wrong page initially, and direct URL navigation was used as a fallback), the agent did successfully use the Wikipedia search functionality (fill + click on search result @e49) to reach the article before also using direct URL navigation.
